What We Do

Every Install,
Flawlessly Done.

01
Precision TV Mounting

Flat, tilt, and full-motion mounts on any wall type. Drywall, concrete, brick, tile handled with precision.

From $100
02
Clean, Hidden Wiring

In-wall routing or surface raceways. Zero visible wiring. Your TV looks like it grew out of the wall.

From $40 — no visible wires
03
Outlet Installation

In-wall power outlet added behind your TV for a completely clean look. No extension cords, no clutter.

~$150/hr + parts
04
Soundbar Install

Wall-mounted soundbars aligned perfectly below your TV. Cables managed, brackets secured, audio calibrated.

From $100
05
Smart Home & AV

Full AV rack builds, surround sound, PoE systems. High-end Airbnbs, commercial spaces, luxury residences.

Contact for quote
06
TV Delivery & Dismount

We deliver TVs to your location and safely remove existing mounted TVs. Under 75" is $25, 75"+ is $70.

From $25/TV

Why VistaMount

The install you actually wanted.

No subcontractors, no surprises. Every job is handled personally — consistent quality, zero handoffs, and an installer who actually cares how it looks when we leave. Specializing in fireplace, tile, and high-end installs.

800+ installs. Consistent 5-star results. Zero handoffs.
All wall types including concrete and brick
In-wall cable concealment on every install
Sanus and ONN mounts - no cheap hardware
Not the cheapest — just done right the first time

Professional Grade

We Show Up Equipped.

Not every installer brings the right tools. We do. Every job gets the full kit — no guessing, no damage, no callbacks.

Drilling & Driving
Milwaukee M18 FUEL
Drill & impact driver. Maximum torque for any wall type — drywall, tile, concrete, brick.
Leveling
Milwaukee + Bosch Laser
Laser levels for perfect alignment every time. No eyeballing — your TV is always straight.
Wall Scanning
Walabot Advanced Stud Finder
Sees studs, pipes, and live wires behind the wall before we drill. Zero surprises.
Inspection
Borescope + Thermal Camera
See inside walls before cutting. Thermal camera detects heat signatures and hidden wiring.
Electrical Safety
Voltmeter + Safety Kit
Full electrical safety equipment and voltmeter on every job involving outlet work.
Cutting & Finishing
Milwaukee Multi-Tool
Precise cuts for outlet boxes, cable access, and in-wall work. Clean edges, no mess left behind.
Cleanup
Milwaukee Vacuum
We clean up after ourselves. Drywall dust, debris — gone before we leave.
The result
Done right.
The first time.
Professional tools mean fewer holes, cleaner installs, and zero damage to your home.
